meaning: 箱根[日本本州岛东南部城镇]
examples: I took the course that stops at Hakone where the station for the ropeway is located to climb Mt. Komagatake.
Articles made using Hakone marquetry are some of the most popular souvenir items for tourists in this area close by Mount Fuji.
Hakone scenic area that together with Fuji belongs to Izu Park. The volcano's wonders appeared prominently before our eyes.
They are made by only five craftsmen in the world, most of who live in Hakone, Japan.
Last week I was in Hakone, Japan, a small city an hour west of Tokyo where all of the masters in this craft originated.
